programme.desc: From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!

programme.title: All Were Top 5 January Hits! 80-89

programme.title: Hits That Missed!

programme.title: The 50 Ultimate Breakup Songs

programme.title: 90s Rock: From Grunge to Alt

programme.title: Killer Cuts Of The 00s!
programme.desc: A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!

programme.title: Nicky Horne's 30 Hardest Hitters!

programme.title: Loud & Legendary: The 20 Greatest!
programme.desc: The most iconic & ear-shattering rock songs that shaped the genre! Including Led Zeppelin's timeless Whole Lotta Love & AC/DC's rebellious Highway to Hell. Crank it up & enjoy!

programme.title: EXO 'I'm Home' MV
programme.desc: EXO has hinted at a new winter song that follows the emotional resonance of the chart resurgence of “First Snow.” “I'm Home” is a pop ballad that blends delicate piano melodies with lush strings, expressing the happiness of being reunited with loved ones and the wish to stay in this moment for a long time.

programme.title: MINHO 민호 'TEMPO' MV
programme.desc: In addition, the performance is designed with bold, dynamic movements that highlight MINHO's distinctive physique, along with choreography that matches the song's groovy mood. The latter part of the performance, featuring impressive synergy with the dancers, is expected to deliver an energetic atmosphere that everyone can enjoy together.The title track “TEMPO” is a dance song that creates a cool vibe with its groovy 808 bass and a variety of rhythmic instruments. The lyrics convey the message of approaching the other person at the pace they desire.

programme.title: YOONA 'Wish to Wish' MV
programme.desc: The harmonious blend of YOONA's soft, calm vocal tone and its lively orchestral arrangement leaves a strong impression. The lyrics written by YOONA herself convey the heartfelt message of “let's continue to shine together for a long time,” giving the song an even more special meaning.'Wish to Wish' is a medium-tempo pop song that reinterprets the mood of 1980s pop.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter ARO! ARO burst into the music scene in July 2018 with the single A Good Daughter. Her stage name means engraving in Korean which conveys her hope to engrave her name in the minds of the public. She's also known for her ability to express common relatable issues in her own unique way deeply touching and soothing listeners' hearts. Sentimental at times yet unpredictable at others she's definitely engraving her name in our hearts. In this episode ARO performs SEESAW When The Night Comes Day 1 Why Did You Answer? and also her cover of Delispice's Confession. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this talented artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the hottest newtro master PARKMOONCHI! PARKMOONCHI became known to the public through the variety show Hangout with Yoo where she displayed her exceptional ability to put her own contemporary spin to 1990s music. That sensational appearance led her to actively collaborate with numerous big names in the music scene including Suho and Baekhyun from EXO Kang Daniel Kwon Jin Ah and Young K from Day6. Also known for her witty and unexpectional point of view PARKMOONCHI shares with everyone how the Generagion MZ enjoys the music and culture of older generations - no wonder how she became an icon of MZers. In September this year PARKMOONCHI released a new EP named ParkRuRa with RuRu and RaRa. Combining R&B new jack swing and soul music the three musicians also known as PARKMOONCHI UNIVERSE show off their unique yet beautiful universe under their motto Pursuing joy and happiness together In this episode PARKMOONCHI performs m e s s a g e . . . and Move! from the album ParkRuRa her cover of Lee Ye-rin's Come On Baby Tonight as well as I Want To Hold Your Hand and The Story Of The Year with Onewoo. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet this delightful and unpredicted artist!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is talented vocalist BAEK A YEON! Known for her crystal clear voice BAEK A YEON made her big debut in 2012 after making it to the top three of the popular talent search show K-Pop Star in 2011. Then she dominated the top spots of various music charts and shows with the song Shouldn't Have... which she wrote at the end of a disappointing relationship. After that she released more songs about love oftentimes unrequited love including Looking For Love and so-so which has eventually become her own genre. In this episode BAEK A YEON performs Shouldn't Have... so-so Sweet Lies a Good Boy Jealousy and 0% the lead single off her latest album Observe. Tune in to I'm LIVE and fall in love with her crystalline voice once again!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter eldon! This artist became known to the public after taking part in the TV program Superstar K Season 7 where he made it to the top 5. Then in 2016 he officially made his debut as the vocalist of Martin Smith and once again surprised the public with his rhythmical vibes and songwriting skills. 2 years later in 2018 he started his career as a solo artist under his new stage name eldon. From his debut single Ghost! to Pink cheeks to Do monsters love too? he has already released an impressive set of albums which are full of his personal feelings and experiences. Also Pink cheeks was featured in the hit TV series My Roommate Is a Gumiho and widened his reach in the industry. In this episode eldon performs Pink cheeks Back to you and more to show off his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet eldon!

programme.title: After School Club
programme.desc: Far apart, but together in heart!The group continuing to rise with their incredible performance!so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!JUST B is coming ASC with their new album [JUST BEAT].We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club,

programme.title: After School Club
programme.desc: We've got a lot of prizes ready for those who participate on After School Club, so if you want to make some special memories, don't hesitate!The group with infinite potential, DKB! DKB has promoted actively with their third mini-album [GROWTH], and they are coming to ASC. Far apart, but together in heart!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of Christmas Special Year-End Special and New-Year Special and the guest of the Christmas Special Episode is Lee Jin ah. Lee Jin ah is a pop/jazz singer-songwriter known for her exceptional piano playing and composition capabilities. Her jazz-based music covering pop R&B hip-hop ballads and more has long been supported with enthusiasm by the public and also by fellow musicians and she always comforts the hearts of listeners with her genuine heartfelt message. In an effort to widen her artistry she made her debut as a film music director in May this year she made her debut as a film music director with Kids Are Fine. In this Christmas special edition Lee Jin ah performs The Wall Blocks Me Noisily Everywhere Awake Yum Yum Yum and her own version of Santa Claus Is Coming To Town. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene including Jannabi 10CM HYUKOH SE SO NEON CNBLUE Jeongmilla BIBI NIve and Lydia Lee have participated in the show. Also only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: I'm LIVE presents three special episodes in commemoration of the end of the year and having a live audience for the first time in 2 years! The trilogy is composed of the Christmas Special the Year-End Special and the New-Year Special and the guest of the Year-End Special Episode is Kwon Jin ah. Kwon Jin ah is known for her tranquil and heartwarming voice that genuinely comforts our hearts. In February this year she released her first self-produced EP “The Way For Us” and showed off her capabilities as a songwriter and producer as well. In this episode Kwon Jin ah performs “KNOCK” “This Winter” and her solo version of “Hello Antenna Hello Christmas” the carol jointly released by musicians on the record label Antenna. Also famous for her live singing skills and ticket-selling power this artist is bound to melt our souls during this cold winter season. I'm LIVE allows musicians and fans to interact up-close within a distance of 1 meter. Numerous big names and rookies in the Korean music scene including Jannabi 10CM HYUKOH SE SO NEON CNBLUE Jeongmilla BIBI NIve and Lydia Lee have participated in the show. Also only those who have been fully vaccinated (defined as more than 14 days after the final vaccine dose) can participate in the live recording as an audience.

programme.desc: the show is known for its format where celebrity guests are subjected to harsh, tongue-in-cheek jokes and "roasted" by a team of comedians, including Krushna Abhishek, Bharti Singh, and Sudesh Lehri.

programme.title: Comedy Nights with Kapil-Shahrukh Khan
programme.desc: Comedy Nights with Kapil was a popular Indian Hindi-language sketch comedy and celebrity talk show that combined a fictional household setting with a traditional interview format.

programme.desc: Khatra Khatra Khatra is a comedy-reality show featuring Bharti Singh, Harsh Limbachiyaa, Punit Pathak, and others from Khatron Ke Khiladi. The show focuses on performing funny, embarrassing dares and playing pranks on each other, with losers facing humiliating punishments.

programme.title: Maata Ki Mahima
programme.desc: In the divine saga inspired by Bhakt Prahlad, witness the journey of Mahima, a devout disciple of Maata, as she challenges the tyranny of Indrayani, whose sins overflow in a reign of oppression. Sent into the heart of Indrayani's lineage, Mahima embodies the triumph of faith over darkness, destined to end the era of tyranny and usher in an era of righteousness.

programme.title: Yam Kisi Se Kam Nahin
programme.desc: A misfit, a God, a husband, and a breadwinner, Yamraj is a common man with a fancy job title. He tries his best to give his family what they need and manages to make a mess of everything in the bargain. Lovable and goofy, this God of Death is anything but grim. Join our hardworking but hen-pecked Yamraj, his beloved buffalo and his motely family and friends in a slice-of-life sitcom to find out how the cookie really crumbles!

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Humkadam
programme.desc: Humkadam is a first of its kind show on Indian television that presents the complicated dynamics of ‘Saas' and ‘Bahu' in a clutter breaking manner. It tells the story of Tara and Shanti who are two diametrically opposite personalities, stuck in unprecedented situations. Just when they thought life had come to a full stop, is where they had to put their differences aside and start a new journey. Will they become each other's Humkadam to face all the adversities together?

programme.title: Dharmakshetra
programme.desc: As The Great War Of Mahabharata Is Over, Kurukshetra Lies Barren In Its Great Warriors And King. The Thin Line Between Fair And Unfair, Deceit And Loyalty, Betrayal And Duty, Has Never Been Questioned. Dharmakshetra Resurfaces These Buried Questions And Allows The Legendary Characters Of This Tale An Opportunity To Tell Their Side Of The Story For The Very First Time. In A Post-Apocalyptic Trial, Held In Maharaj Chitragupta'S Court, The Seeming Villains ‘Kauravas' Are Allowed To Accuse The So Called Heroes ‘Pandavas' And Vice Versa, In An Attempt To Justify Their Actions. On A Primary Level, Dharamkshetra Attempts To Ask Some Key Questions About The Nature Of Humanity, While At The Same Time, It Puts Together The Forgotten Pieces Of The Story We Thought We Knew.

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? The Episodes Of This Chat Show Will Have An Enthralling Line-Up Of Gag Artists, Activities/Games & Comedy Segments, Along With The Barrel Of Laughs – Pritam.

programme.title: Dahej Daasi
programme.desc: This story is about a 19yr old girl named Chunari, who dreams of marriage and a happy family. However, she becomes entangled in the chains of deceit, finding herself on the path to becoming a Dahej Dasi, which is a tradition still prevalent in the backward regions of Rajasthan. The show unfolds into a compelling drama of tradition versus rebellion, love versus oppression.

programme.desc: Mr Bean forgets his teddy's Birthday - then gives him a treat to remember.

programme.title: Super Sky
programme.desc: Fascinated by the super spy show, Mr. Bean decides to become a super spy himself. When he becomes suspicious of the Bruisers planning something, he starts to follow them. Later, he notices that the Bruisers are putting an old lady into a van.

programme.title: Fish Sitting
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has to look after Mrs. Wicket's goldfish.

programme.title: Hotel Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.title: Dancing Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to learn to dance to impress his girlfriend Irma.

programme.title: Haunted House
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is trying to impress some kids in the park with his football skills.

programme.title: Haircut
programme.desc: Mr Bean has a bad hair day.

programme.title: Save That Tree
programme.desc: Bean is showing Irma his favourite tree when he discovers a tree surgeon getting ready to cut it down.

programme.title: The Mole
programme.desc: Mr Bean loses control of a pest and makes a mountain out of a molehill.

programme.title: Opera Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's car has broken down and he is late meeting Irma at the opera.

programme.title: Trophy Bean
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket's Nephew is staying with her when he wins two tickets to an Outward Bound course.

programme.title: Royal Bean
programme.desc: During a visit to Buckingham Palace, Mr Bean meets the lady of the house.

programme.title: Spring Clean
programme.desc: Mr Bean finds that cleanliness can be a filthy business.

programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Bean At The Museum
programme.desc: Mr. Bean thinks he's just dug up a valuable coin in the back-garden.

programme.title: Missing Teddy
programme.desc: Bean discovers that, in the world of organised crime, a teddy isn't always a teddy. Sometimes it's a rabbit.

programme.title: Taxi Bean
programme.desc: When one of the toy cars of his racing track set becomes broken, Mr. Bean decides to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Big Freeze
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wakes up on a freezing cold winter's morning to discover that the boiler is broken.

programme.title: The Fly
programme.desc: Bean fights a loosing battle with a winged beast from Hell.

programme.title: INDRANI
programme.desc: A father educates his daughter who marries and faces hardships eventually reconciling with her husband after separation.

programme.title: BHALOBASAR GALPO
programme.desc: A widowed woman's survival with dignity and chastity in a social system.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.2
programme.desc: Falling for a scheme by President Park and Mr. Choi to trap Lee Gun, Mi Young unknowingly drinks a spiked beverage and enters the wrong hotel room having also drunk the spiked drink, Lee Gun walks into the same room. Mistaking each other for Attorney Min and Se Ra, the two spend a fateful night together.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.3
programme.desc: Back in her hometown, Mi Young is shocked to learn she's pregnant—and her mother finds out, too. Lee Gun heads to Mi Young's mom's ssambap restaurant with President Park. Yong plays a video of Lee Gun and Mi Young—found on Gun's USB—for Chairwoman Wang, but her unexpected reaction throws him off. Meanwhile, Mi Young goes alone to the OB-GYN clinic, where she meets Daniel.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.4
programme.desc: Disheartened after repeated failures to find his sister, Daniel is in a slump. Through Chief Tak, Gun learns about a mysterious stimulant. Mi Young moves into Gun's lavish home, but finds herself caught between Gun's coldness and the chairwoman's kindness.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.5
programme.desc: Startled by Gun's sudden chill after the wedding, Mi Young is taken aback when he even presents divorce papers. To steady him, Chairwoman Wang recommends a prenatal class for Mi Young, and Gun reluctantly attends. Meanwhile, Gun bumps into Daniel and Mi Young at the chairwoman's house.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.6
programme.desc: Outside the prenatal class, Gun and Mi Young run into one of Se Ra's friends, while Se Ra decides to return to Korea after her New York performance. Hearing that an industrial-waste plant is slated for Yeo-ul Island, Mi Young feels betrayed by Gun, and her sudden change in attitude starts to irk him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.7
programme.desc: Gun grows uneasy about Daniel's presence, and Mi Young tries to keep her distance from Gun. Mi Ja arrives in Seoul with Mr. Choi and goes out with Mi Young upon hearing Gun sold the Yeo-ul Island factory, she's furious. Meanwhile, Gun suggests that he and Mi Young start sharing a room.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: When it Rains it Pours
programme.desc: Unknown to the world, Thomas Edison built a secret lab where he invented a virtual version of himself and a robot named Von Bolt. With Edison as their guide, Angie and friends JD, Kent and Nicky set out to explore the fascinating world of science

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.desc: Unknown to the world, Thomas Edison built a secret lab where he invented a virtual version of himself and a robot named Von Bolt. With Edison as their guide, Angie and friends JD, Kent and Nicky set out to explore the fascinating world of science

programme.desc: Jerry's TV time is interrupted by Jane, who introduces him to an interactive book of alphabets and images. They _hinage in a joyful exchange, using toys and everyday items to represent the letters and create a fun learning experience. The scene ends with a _hint of more playful learning adventures to come

programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Invention Story
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Armor Monster
programme.desc: One day, 12-year-old Zachary once again met the subway "0" which her mother took nine years ago, and the appearance of the subway seems to have some connection with the necklace left by her mother. In order to find her mother, Zachary stepped on the magic subway without hesitation! When the train arrived at the station, Zachary found that he had come to a magical world of elves. He also met the elf Rooney chased by hunters. In order to protect the Rooney, they fled to the underground city. Here, Zachary meets Scarlett, a red haired girl, and Zachary accidently becomes the Rooney and is regarded as a half-face hunter who is under searched with big bonus in the underground city. In order to leave the underground city to find his mother, Zachary has to agree to fight with the old wizard, the King of the underground city. Under Scarlett's training, Zachary grew up fast. In the battle, his determination to protect the Rooney inspired the strength in the necklace and defeated the old wizard. And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Squad 2
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Squad is a team of four: Bablu, Dablu, Lakha and Neva. They are the town's guardians, patrolling the forest and helping residents in need. Together, they overcome many challenges, interact with lots of different characters and help their friends break their bad habits.

And just when the angry wizard decided to show his real strength, the real half hunter came to the rescue. The real half hunter even had the same necklace. The unexpected encounter of the two necklaces triggered the emergence of spirits and demons which are eager for energy. In order to protect the underground city from being ravage, the half-face hunter left the underground city with Zachary and his friends. They used their tactics to temporarily eliminate the demons in the stone forest near the beast forest, and they entered the beast forest to avoid refuge.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Squad 2
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Squad is a team of four: Bablu, Dablu, Lakha and Neva. They are the town's guardians, patrolling the forest and helping residents in need. Together, they overcome many challenges, interact with lots of different characters and help their friends break their bad habits.

programme.title: Invention Story
programme.desc: Carrot Town was once a low-tech community with candles, wind-up clocks, and woodburning stoves. Then a fluke came along – a free-thinking rabbit named SILAS HOPNER who invented a machine that could turn carrots into a fuel called Carrotsene (like kerosene).

programme.title: Invention Story

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Cubs
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu Cubs is a brand-new edutainment series showing children that learning can be fun. At this scenic Pine Tree Kindergarten, all the cubs observe the world in their own creative and wondrous ways. Here you will learn everything from the value of friendship to exploring the mysteries of science and language.Bablu Dablu Cubs will teach kids how to help others while preparing themselves for life in this beautiful world. This show is a colorful paradise for kids, teeming with adventures around every corner.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: The Adventures of Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent is about a young spy with a whole lot to learn, who is paired with a very unlikely partner... his mom!

programme.title: Tom' s Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they' re guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other' s company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green's new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he's the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb's eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn't think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn't think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb's world. Ebb and Flo's home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn't Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Kings of Restoration

programme.title: Counting Cars

programme.title: The Fast History Of
programme.desc: Explores the Nabisco history, filled with boardroom conflicts and individual vendettas.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Lost Recipes
programme.desc: Lost Recipes is all about the food which is diffused into the pages of history and the rediscovery of a tradition that once was. Our host Aditya Bal is on a quest to unearth the once-popular culinary traditions through thirteen regions in India.But these recipes are no longer found in cookbooks, old or new, and seem to have evolved with time. Aditya must turn back the clock and wade through folk and lore to find the original, Lost Recipes.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Kissa Currency Ka
programme.desc: The introduction of currency was a key step in the evolution of civilization. As the kingdoms and dynasties across the country rose and fell, they left their mark on the currency they produced. This series explores the coins minted by each kingdom in Indian history, and uses stories about the coins to tell the history of the kingdom itself.

programme.title: Making a Crabby Tide Pool Aquarium in New England!
programme.desc: Mark builds a tide pool aquarium along the New England coast and fills it with crabs and marine critters. It's hands-on science at its best.The vampire fish lives up to its name. Coyote gets bitten and shows the terrifying teeth and feeding behavior of this river predator.

programme.title: Stung by a Bullet Ant! (Truth Revealed)

programme.title: Bitten by 3 Attack Dogs!
programme.desc: In a dramatic training exercise, Coyote allows himself to be bitten by three trained attack dogs. Protective gear is tested to the limit.Ever wanted to catch fireflies and make a glow lantern? Coyote shows how to safely observe these luminous bugs and builds a bug-powered lantern.

programme.title: CombiNation Plates
programme.desc: Turkey, think Silk Road spices. Indonesia, lots of seafood and tropical fruits! Curious and adventurous host Bianca Osbourne is your CombiNATION Plates culinary guide through both food cultures. First, check out Turkish Spice Crusted Lamb Rack with yogurt and blistered peppers. Next, an Indonesian tribute: Crab Leg with Coconut Curry. For the 'common ingredient'? Two takes on tender, savoury eggplant! Turkish Eggplant is braised and served with parsley and feta and the Indonesian take is served with fried garlic and sweet soy. For the CombiNATION Plate? Peanut- chili Sate sauce replaces walnut for Pazili TrancÌ§a, a classically Turkish halibut presentation, also served here with unique, savoury, coconut 'baklava' for a plate no-one has ever seen before!

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.sub-title: Dubai: 24 hour layover in the desert
programme.desc: Sashi is doing something he's never done! A layover style episode. He's got just 24 hours in the desert metropolis of Dubai. After seeking out the hive of human activity at Dubai's bustling souks, Sashi does the absolute opposite, by venturing out in the desert.

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: The US Virgin Islands is one of the most popular destinations in the Caribbean - how about their cuisine? With a true blue Jeep 4x4, Sashi explores the chains of islands, learning stories of local cuisines, brand new distilleries and much more

programme.title: Maximum Foodie
programme.desc: Sashi is in a strip of islands in the middle of nowhere - French Polynesia! He scours the island of Bora Bora in search of a real local's meal but goes empty handed. Switching gears, he looks for respite at the legendary Four Seasons Bora Bora where he embarks on a deep-sea fishing run with local fishermen, catching yellowtail tuna.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Jonathan rides from Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh, finding hidden bunkers, rebel stories, rare martial arts, ancient ruins, and everyday heroes.

programme.title: Food Unknown
programme.desc: It's the birthplace of Halloween, but the ghosts and ghouls which have canvassed the world have not scared up much interest in Irish cuisine. Mounting a classic motorcycle Jonathan tours a land of mystic traditions, boisterous locals, and iconic scenery. The world's most magnetic pub culture draws him in, border conflict pushes him out, and dark legends pull him around. It's an adventure soaked in rain, lore, and the food of ancestor's past.

programme.title: Food Unknown
programme.desc: Jonathan faces his toughest challenge yet as he enters a country that has been coming to grips in defining and understanding their own cuisine. Through the historical turmoil and harsh climate, Russia has lost it's traditional way of cooking, and eating. But the country is reviving this culture Jonathan ventures the far stretches of the country to learn about modern cooks, as well as ancient kitchens housing the one key tool that gave birth to true Russian cuisine, the Russian oven. He'll learn their insights, understand their efforts, and work with traditional Russian ingredients to learn what the cuisine used to be, and where it's headed today.

programme.title: Food Unknown
programme.desc: Jonathan Legg is from California and he thinks he knows Mexican cuisine. This notion gets shattered as he experiences the onslaught of food in Mexico city! Between trying scorpion tacos and dodging shady markets in San Juan, he learns the dark art of sacred drinks, like pulque and mezcal, now turned into social libations. His journey also takes him to Oaxaca where he gets the low down on the fabled Mole sauce, and a long haul to a remote village reveals a secret ceremony that has origins of dark arts!

programme.title: It All Begins With A Song

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: America's Musical Journey
programme.desc: A cross-country adventure through the musical heritage of America and the cultural cities where America's music was born.
